overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a static view from a high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking a futuristic city. The scene features a rumpled bed, large panoramic window, and occasional flying vehicles passing by against a backdrop of megastructures and distant mountains.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains static inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a large panoramic window at a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering megastructures and distant mountains. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window while the room remains dimly lit with natural light streaming in over an unmade bed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative perspective from a dimly lit interior that looks out upon a vast, futuristic urban expanse. It begins inside a cyberpunk bedroom, where natural light streams over an unmade bed to illuminate the quiet atmosphere of the room. As the gaze lingers, the focus extends through a large panoramic window toward a sprawling cityscape dominated by towering megastructures and distant mountains. The scene remains poised in this stillness, punctuated only by the occasional movement of flying vehicles gliding past the glass against the backdrop of the high-tech horizon.
